summary: Review #8 feedback from gndrmnn addressed: removed trivial SetCondition/GetCondition wrappers from conditions package, replaced all internal call sites with direct meta.SetStatusCondition/meta.FindStatusCondition calls, and eliminated the private findCondition helper in assertions package by switching to meta.FindStatusCondition. All tests pass, 100% coverage on conditions package, 93% on assertions, go vet and golangci-lint clean.

tests_checklist.item: Edge cases are covered (nil, empty, missing conditions)
Tests removed for deleted functions (SetCondition, GetCondition)
Remaining tests still cover IsReady and AllTrue thoroughly

code_quality_checklist.item: Follows existing code patterns (Gomega dot-import, NewGomegaWithT)
No dead code or unused imports remain
License headers and Feature tracking present

security_checklist.item: No user input handling — pure condition helpers
No secrets or sensitive data in code

architecture_checklist.item: Trivial wrappers removed per reviewer feedback — callers use upstream API directly
Assertions package uses meta.FindStatusCondition instead of local duplicate
No Kubernetes API calls — functions remain pure

dry_yagni_checklist.item: No duplicated condition-finding logic (findCondition removed, meta.FindStatusCondition used everywhere)

fail_fast_checklist.item: Not applicable — no error paths in remaining functions

defensive_checklist.item: Nil and empty slice inputs handled correctly

metadata.title: B001: Implement common types and pure function packages

checklist_walkthrough.C1: PASS — reviewer asked to remove SetCondition/GetCondition wrappers and use upstream API directly; done
checklist_walkthrough.C2: PASS — both parts of feedback addressed: wrappers removed, findCondition in assertions replaced with meta.FindStatusCondition
checklist_walkthrough.C3: PASS — edge cases (nil, empty, missing) tested for IsReady and AllTrue
checklist_walkthrough.C4: N/A — no error returns in remaining functions
checklist_walkthrough.C5: PASS — no external consumers of SetCondition/GetCondition exist in Go code (only in architecture docs which are read-only)
checklist_walkthrough.PC3: PASS — meta.FindStatusCondition used consistently across conditions.go and assertions.go
